expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies the project's tech stack
expectations.evidence: 'Node.js/Express server', language table with 576 JS lines

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: Report is primarily descriptive — maps architecture and design decisions but doesn't identify problems or rate severity. Has 'What's Missing (by design)' section but no findings with impact/suggestion structure.

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: No structured positives section. Positive observations woven into prose but not separated.

expectations.text: Report gives a clear picture of major components and relationships
expectations.evidence: Excellent architecture section with single-file server breakdown, tool system docs, data layer, middleware, plugin manifest explanation

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
expectations.evidence: File counts and line numbers throughout, tool handler list, dependency count

expectations.text: Report would help a new developer understand the codebase
expectations.evidence: Very strong onboarding document with architecture section, key design decisions, supporting artifacts list
